evaluator_feedback: Baseline deliverables are present and the agronomy note contains explicit, reproducible pseudocode, rankings, and sensitivity checks. Primary issues are inspectability and documentation: the GeoJSON content was not previewable in the grader/verifier, the final recommendations are narrative rather than a clearly machine-parsable table/CSV, the budget-allocation pseudocode lacks a documented defensive branch for the sum-of-nonblocked technical-scores == 0 case, and n_leaching_risk is used only as a relative guardrail without an explicit numeric policy threshold. Also clarify the separate deterministic precheck (artifact-contract) score vs. model semantic score to avoid consumer confusion.
label: positive

raw_step.observation: Computed packet-only technical and economic scores plus a 5% conservative/optimistic sensitivity check. All records exceeded the fertilizer cost limit; R2 also exceeded the yield limit. Technical ranking was R2 > R3 > R4 > R1 and economic ranking was R2 > R1 > R3 > R4.

raw_step.state_change: Decision logic fixed: blocker overrides ROI, all records need_review, and R2 is the strongest follow-up candidate.
